promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch after the Axis-0 v0.3 cleanup reduction because it is the first strong overlay-to-kernel term-conflict surface in folder order.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the most reusable overlay fences, naming locks, Topology4 packet, and ontology-smuggling risks.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The Axes Master A2-mid batch was used to keep aligned topology and axis fences distinct from the companion's heavier overlay pressures.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until the companion overlay pressures were reduced into a smaller reusable packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The companion term-conflict parent batch plus the existing Axes Master A2-mid comparison anchor were sufficient to isolate the stable fences and preserve the live conflicts for this pass.

quarantined_items.name: JUNG_IGT_OPERATOR_ROLES_AS_KERNEL_ONTOLOGY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The operator-role mapping is useful only as provisional rosetta and must not be promoted into kernel ontology.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the companion's strongest overlay fences and translation-hygiene surfaces without normalizing its live semantic conflicts.
They keep source lineage explicit while preserving nonreplacement and provisionality rules.
They remain small, reusable, and proposal-side for later comparison work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain direct conflict zones or ontology-smuggling risks rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as contradictions, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the Axes Master A2-mid batch only as a comparison anchor for aligned Topology4 semantics.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded companion overlay-fence reduction pass.
